title: Infrastructure Setup: Docker Compose, Dockerfiles, GitLab CI/CD
description:
Создать полную dev-инфраструктуру:
1. docker-compose.yml (root) — все 13 сервисов с healthcheck
2. deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml — production-вариант (Double Edit Rule)
3. backend/Dockerfile — multi-stage (builder + runtime, non-root user)
4. frontend/Dockerfile — multi-stage (node build + Nuxt SSR)
5. deploy/nginx/nginx.conf — reverse proxy, TLS, security headers, WebSocket, rate limit
6. .gitlab-ci.yml — stages: build/test/push/deploy
7. .env.example — все переменные задокументированы, без реальных секретов
8. deploy/prometheus/prometheus.yml, deploy/loki/loki-config.yml
